subject: CIR. NO. 404-Bus routes to be followed from 1st April 2026
body:
[image: logo1.jpg]
*SRI SATHYA SAI VIDYA VIHAR*

          Scheme No. 54, A B Road, INDORE (MP) 452010

                    CBSE School No. : 50056,   CBSE Affiliation No.1030023
                  E-mail: sai@sathyasaiindore.com <sai@sathyasaiindore.com>
     Ph: 0731-2553023
*CIR.NO.SSSVV/2025-26/404
     Date:30th March 2026*

Dear Parents



Sai Ram!



*We are pleased to share the bus routes to be followed from 1st April 2026.*
 The bus routes have been attached herewith for your perusal. Kindly ensure
the drop and pick up of your ward from the designated stop on time.



*Please contact the Transport officer, Mr. Jitu Patel (Ph. 9826095139) for
any query.*



Looking forward to your cooperation.



With Best Regards





Dr. Anju Chopra

Principal

Email - principal@sathyasaiindore.com

Website - www.sathyasaiindore.com
